prompt: Match the two halves of the sentences.
explanation: Each sentence half completes a common prepositional phrase (for a long time, in the middle of, in time, for fun, on DVD, on stage).

pairs.left: I waited outside the tennis club for
pairs.right: a long time, but George didn't appear.

pairs.left: When you rang, I was in
pairs.right: the middle of cleaning my football boots.

pairs.left: We finally got to the stadium just in
pairs.right: time to see the match start.
fun, and I don't want to do it as a job.

pairs.left: I loved that film and when it comes out
pairs.right: on DVD, I'll definitely get it.
stage, with all the audience clapping.
